Third-year Computer Science PhD student — GPA 4.0/4.0Jan 2024 – Now

Federal University of Mato Grosso (UFMT)Cuiabá, MT, Brazil

B.Sc. in Computer Science — GPA 3.62/4.0 (8.84/10.0)2017 – 2021

Research Experience

Graduate Research Assistant2024 – Now

University of Massachusetts Lowell — advised by Prof. Paul DownenLowell, MA, USA

  • Study how codata and copatterns can bridge the functional and object-oriented paradigms, giving programmers a declarative way to define infinite and effectful objects.
  • Developing CoPy, a Python language extension that brings copattern-based object-oriented programming to Python.
  • Contributed to CoScheme [1], a Racket/Scheme macro library for compositional copatterns backed by a sound equational theory.

Undergraduate Research Assistant2020 – 2021

Federal University of Mato GrossoCuiabá, MT, Brazil

  • Evaluated audio data-augmentation methods for bird-call classification.

Research Assistant2020 – 2021

Federal University of Mato GrossoCuiabá, MT, Brazil

  • Co-created RSDD [2], a satellite-imagery dataset for modeling deforestation in the Brazilian state of Mato Grosso.

Teaching Experience

Undergraduate Teaching Assistant2018 – 2021

Federal University of Mato GrossoCuiabá, MT, Brazil

  • Designed problem sets and led recitations and office hours across five courses: Discrete Mathematics, Data Structures, Theory of Computation, Algorithms, and Compilers.

Industry Experience

Software Engineer2021 – 2022

AcertoRemote · Belo Horizonte, MG, Brazil

  • Built in-house tools that automated workflows for non-technical teams and optimized database queries at a debt-collection company.

Software Engineer Intern2018 – 2021

NUTI-ICCuiabá, MT, Brazil

  • Developed a health-surveillance data system and public-health dashboards for the Mato Grosso State Health Department.
  • Built a report-management system for POLITEC-MT, the state forensic-services department.
